lrml:Obligation.lrml:Condition: otherwise expressly stated, the following words

arg.ind: the meanings shown in this chapter

lrml:Obligation.lrml:Condition: terms are not defined in the code requirements

arg.ind: the meanings ascribed to them as in those provisions and requirements

lrml:Obligation.lrml:Condition: terms are not defined through the methods authorized by this section, such terms shall have ordinarily accepted meanings such as the context implies

arg.ind: meanings such as the context implies
a place of human habitation or a place of employment where agricultural products are processed , treated or packaged

lrml:Bearer.lrml:Agent: Such rooms and spaces that are also part of a dwelling unit

lrml:Obligation.lrml:Condition: that a basement shall be considered as a story above grade plane where the finished surface of the floor above the basement is

arg.ind: the classification of all buildings and structures

lrml:Obligation.lrml:Condition: a structure is proposed for a purpose which is not specifically provided for in this code requirements, such structure shall be classified in the group which the occupancy most nearly resembles, according to the fire safety

lrml:Bearer.lrml:Agent: Spaces which are incidental to the main occupancy
Areas that are incidental to the main occupancy
Exception : Incidental use areas within and serving a dwelling unit

lrml:Obligation.lrml:Condition: requires a fire-resistance-rated separation, the incidental use area shall be separated from the remainder of the building with a fire barrier
permits an automatic fire-extinguishing system without a fire barrier, the incidental use area shall be separated by construction capable of resisting the passage of smoke

arg.ind: to separate accessory use areas classified as Group H in accordance with Section 2.2.3.1 , and incidental use areas in accordance with Section 2.2.1.1

lrml:Obligation.lrml:Condition: a building is occupied by two

lrml:Bearer.lrml:Agent: Areas of Group H-2 , H-3 , H-4 or H-5 occupancies

lrml:Obligation.lrml:Condition: required by , areas of Group H-1, H-2

lrml:Bearer.lrml:Agent: Where required by , areas of Group H-1 , H-2 or H-3 occupancy
The required type of construction for the building
The most restrictive type of construction , so determined

lrml:Obligation.lrml:Condition: that the most restrictive applicable provisions of Section 2.3

lrml:Bearer.lrml:Agent: A room or space that is intended to be occupied at different times for different purposes

arg.ind: the use of a building or structure , or a portion thereof , for the gathering together of persons for purposes such as civic , social or religious functions , recreation , food or drink consumption or awaiting transportation

lrml:Bearer.lrml:Agent: A room or space used for assembly purposes by less than 50 persons and accessory to another occupancy
Assembly areas with less than 70 m 2 and which are accessory to another occupancy according to Section 2.2.2.1
Assembly occupancies which are accessory to Group E in accordance with Section 2.2.2
Educational rooms , multi - purpose halls and auditoriums which are accessory to mosques in accordance with Section 2.2.2 and which have occupant loads of less than 100
A building or tenant space used for assembly purposes by less than 50 persons

arg.ind: the use of a building or structure , or a portion thereof , for office , professional or servicetype transactions , including storage of records and accounts

lrml:Bearer.lrml:Agent: Business Group B. Business Group B occupancy

arg.ind: the use of a building or structure , or a portion thereof , by six or more persons at any one time for educational purposes through the 12th grade

lrml:Bearer.lrml:Agent: Educational Group E. Educational Group E occupancy
Educational rooms , multi - purpose halls and auditoriums , which are accessory to mosques in accordance with Section 2.2.2 and have occupant loads of less than 100 ,

Factory industrial uses that involve the fabrication or manufacturing of noncombustible materials which during finishing , packing or processing do not involve a significant fire hazard shall be classified as F-2 occupancies and shall include , but not be limited to ,

lrml:Obligation.lrml:Condition: an accurate boiling point is unavailable for the material in question,
, when tested on the intact skin of albino rabbits such a chemical destroys

lrml:Bearer.lrml:Agent: An exothermic reaction , such as the extremely rapid oxidation of a flammable dust or

lrml:Permission.lrml:Condition: a small portion is subjected to fire, severe concussion, impact, the impulse of an initiating agent

lrml:Bearer.lrml:Agent: Materials that react in this manner

arg.ind: severe structural damage to adjacent objects
virtually instantaneous explosion of almost the entire contents of the package

lrml:Obligation.lrml:Condition: ignited as to create a serious hazard

arg.ind: capable of causing fire through friction , absorption or moisture , spontaneous chemical change ,

lrml:Bearer.lrml:Agent: The flash point of a liquid
Mixtures of these materials with ordinary materials , such as water
any hazard evaluation that is required for the precise categorization of this type of material

arg.ind: an explosion hazard ( detonation or deflagration
materials that are sensitive to thermal or mechanical shock at elevated temperatures and pressures
normally unstable and readily undergo violent chemical change
materials that can undergo chemical change with rapid release of energy at normal temperatures and pressures

lrml:Bearer.lrml:Agent: Buildings and structures which contain materials that present a detonation hazard
Buildings and structures which contain materials that present a deflagration hazard or a hazard from accelerated burning
Buildings and structures that contain materials that readily support combustion or present a physical hazard
